Arabic Keyboard — لوحة المفاتيح العربية

Type Arabic online using your keyboard or mouse. Click a key or press the matching key.

Send Email Tweet in Arabic Google in Arabic Google Translate WhatsApp
Characters: 0 Words: 0

⌨ Keyboard Shortcuts

Esc Toggle Arabic / QWERTY mode
Shift Type shifted characters
Caps Toggle caps lock
Ctrl+C Copy text
Ctrl+A Select all text
Ctrl+Z Undo

This Arabic Keyboard enables you to easily type Arabic online without installing an Arabic keyboard. You can use your computer keyboard or mouse to type Arabic letters with this online keyboard.

Pressing Esc toggles between Arabic and QWERTY passthrough mode. Press Shift for additional characters shown in blue. Normal characters are shown in red.
